fields.description:
At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.


WHO WE ARE

Snowflake delivers the Data Cloud — a global network where thousands of organizations mobilize data with near-unlimited scale, concurrency, and performance. Inside the Data Cloud, organizations unite their siloed data, easily discover and securely share governed data, and execute diverse analytic workloads. Wherever data or users live, Snowflake delivers a single and seamless experience across multiple public clouds. Snowflake’s platform is the engine that powers and provides access to the Data Cloud, creating a solution for data warehousing, data lakes, data engineering, data science, data application development, and data sharing. Join Snowflake customers, partners, and data providers already taking their businesses to new frontiers in the Data Cloud. snowflake.com http://snowflake.com


WHO YOU ARE

We’re growing fast and looking for a Creative Producer to join our Brand & Creative team. In this role, you will be dedicated to specific projects—scoping project briefs; creating, managing, and tracking workback schedules and project trackers; and collaborating with the traffic manager to resource the work. This role will schedule and lead meetings, identifying action items, roles and responsibilities, making sure plans are adhered to or modified as needed. The Creative Producer will raise any concerns around risks while helping craft solutions, and keep all parties informed of status and next steps. This role will collate the different workstreams for complex projects and function as the source of truth for the team as well as our stakeholders, serving as one main POC. The focus of this Creative Producer role will be supporting and project managing Brand Design Motions Graphics and Social delivery and but will also manage other projects such as campaigns, events, and brand asset creation and management. This role will report into the Senior Manager, Brand Operations.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Create and maintain project plans, workback schedules, and project trackers with a primary focus on Motion Graphics delivery and Social projects but also Brand Design delivery for non-Motion Graphics related projects

 - Coordinate with the Brand & Creative team to ensure team members have all the information, briefs, specs, files, and GTM strategy they need to action, create and deliver high-quality work within the specified timeframe

 - Manage and lead reviews/stand-up meetings, set agendas, and capture/distribute meeting notes, defining and assigning action items

 - Develop and maintain strong relationships with and functioning as a liaison between Brand & Creative, stakeholders and cross-functional teams such as Product Marketing, Partner Marketing, Global Events Marketing, Content Marketing, and Demand Generation, in addition to agency and vendor partners

 - Understand and break down specs and deliverable lists for teams, consistently ensuring on-time and to-spec delivery of assets to stakeholders/partners

 - Evaluate, iterate, and improve upon processes within the Brand & Creative team and processes between B&C and stakeholders

 - Closely collaborate with Operations Manager and Traffic Manager to ensure proper resourcing based on project needs and timelines


WHAT YOU’LL HAVE

 - A blend of education, extensive hands-on experience, management skills, and proven ability to drive successful creative initiatives

 - Marketing and event experience, preferably in B2B technology and/or B2B agency environments

 - Working knowledge of motion graphics and video production

 - Experience working in fast-paced start-up environments and high-growth companies

 - Results-oriented self-starter with humility, empathy, responsiveness, collaboration, and consensus-building skills

 - Strong work ethic with a high degree of accuracy, technical acumen, creativity, and follow-through

 - Strong project management skills and experience working successfully with cross-functional teams, as well as outside agencies

 - Proactive approach to adopting new software, tools, and processes; comfortable evaluating emerging technologies and bringing recommendations to the team

 - Ability to juggle multiple inputs from key stakeholders against tight timelines

 - Confidence in managing a high volume of projects in parallel, working in project management systems, and delivering meaningful updates to your key stakeholders

 - Strong creative intuition combined with a comprehensive knowledge of creative production

 - Solid understanding of required file formats for motion graphics, video, print and digital delivery

 - Exceptional communicator who can both influence and listen to find common ground

 - Ability to roll up sleeves and diving into the work while leading well under pressure


PREFERRED SKILLS AND EDUCATION

 - Proven experience with 6+ years of project management experience leading well known business to business and consumer brands

 - Bachelor degree or higher in Marketing, Communications, Advertising, Business Administration, or similar discipline

 - Proficient in Google Workspace apps: Slides, Docs, Sheets and Microsoft Office Suite: Word, Excel, and Powerpoint.

 - Experience with/working knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite—particularly Adobe After Effects, Figma, Wrike, and Canva

 - Interest in AI tools and automation (e.g., generative AI, scripting, workflow optimization) and a willingness to explore how emerging technology can enhance creative production

 - Will accept any suitable combination of education, experience, training, and a strong track record of success as a creative producer


LET’S DO THIS!

The Snowflake Brand & Creative team is a small, tight-knit, dynamic group of creators and makers who are responsible for shaping the future of the Snowflake brand. We’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. How will you make an impact?

Roles require remote and in-office work at our preferred Menlo Park, CA office.

Every Snowflake employee is expected to follow the company’s confidentiality and security standards for handling sensitive data. Snowflake employees must abide by the company’s data security plan as an essential part of their duties. It is every employee's duty to keep customer information secure and confidential.

Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.

How do you want to make your impact?

For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com http://careers.snowflake.com
fields.title: Senior Creative Producer
